entry.title: IDC FA810606D0001 (P00012) awarded to THE BOEING COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MOD UPDATES CY2008 AND CY2009 RATES FOR THE LABOR RATE MATRIX ESTABLISHED IN SECTION J OF CONTRACT FA8106-06-D-0001 AND INCORPORATE DOWNWARD ADJUSTMENT FOR FINAL FORWARD PRICING RATE AGREEMENT (FPRA) RATES AND FACTORS CLAUSE.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER AIRCRAFT PARTS AND AUXILIARY EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC FA810606D0001 (P00013) awarded to THE BOEING COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MOD UPDATES CY 2009 TECHNICAL PUBLICATIONS PRICE PER PAGE ACTIVITY; AND CY 2009 BOEING AEROSPACE OPERATIONS (BAO) RATES FOR THE LABOR RATE MATRIX ESTABLISHED IN SECTION J OF CONTRACT FA8106-06-D-0001. THE MODIFICATION INCORPORATES DOWNWARD ADJUSTMENT FOR FINAL FORWARD PRICING RATE AGREEMENT (FPRA) RATES AND FACTORS CLAUSE.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER AIRCRAFT PARTS AND AUXILIARY EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC FA810606D0001 (P00015) awarded to THE BOEING COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MOD IS TO CLOSE OUT THE BOEING RE-OPENER CLAUSE OCALC H8477 DATED SEP 2007 ESTABLISHED IN CONTRACT MODIFICATION FA8106-06-D-0001-P00010 FOR APPLICATION TO IDS-WICHITA CY2007 AND CY2008 RATE MATRIX, AND FURTHER APPLIED TO CONTRACT MODIFCATION FA8106-06-D-0001-0010-05 FOR AIRCRAFT 74-0787 PDM/TCTO EFFORT; UPDATE CY2010 AND CY2011 RATES FOR THE LABOR RATE MATRIX (BOEING - IDS WICHITA ONLY) AND ESTABLISH CY2007 AND CY2008 BOEING-WCRS RATES INTO SECTION J OF CONTRACT FA8106-06-D-0001; AND INCORPORATE DOWNWARD ADJUSTMENT FOR FINAL FORWARD PRICING RATE AGREEMENT (FPRA) RATES AND FACTORS CLAUSE, APPLICABLE TO CY2010AND CY2011 BOEING RATES.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER AIRCRAFT PARTS AND AUXILIARY EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
